meaning: n.瀹為獙瀹や腑浣跨敤鐨勯珮搴︾簿瀵嗚繃婊ゅ櫒v.鐢ㄨ繃婊ゅ櫒杩囨护
examples: Flush paint from the ultrafilter with fresh D. I. water, returning it to the paint bath.
Flush cleaning solution from the ultrafilter with D. I. water and return paint to the unit.
In this paper the method of recovering indanthrene dye with PS-1 type ultrafilter made by ourselves is described.
